q1.question: How do I instalar and ativar an eSIM on an iPhone?
q1.answer: Go to Configurações → Cellular → Adicionar eSIM → Scan the QR code from your order confirmation. Follow the prompts and your eSIM will be ready in minutes.

q2.question: How do I instalar and ativar an eSIM on an Android device?
q2.answer: Go to Configurações → Rede & Internet → SIMs → Adicionar eSIM → Scan QR code. The exact path may vary by manufacturer (Samsung, Google Pixel, etc.).

q3.question: How do I instalar manually without código QR?
q3.answer: Go to Configurações → Cellular/Mobile → Adicionar eSIM → Enter Details Manually. Input the SM-DP+ address and activation code from your order confirmation email.

q4.question: How do I set up eSIM using the Direct Instalação Link?
q4.answer: Simply click the direct instalação link sent to your email. Your phone will automaticamente recognize it and prompt you to instalar the eSIM profile.

q5.question: My código QR isn't working. What should I do?
q5.answer: Ensure you have a stable WiFi conexão, try scanning in good lighting, or use the manual instalação method. If issues persist, contact support.

q6.question: Where can I find my código QR or manual detalhes?
q6.answer: Your código QR and manual instalação detalhes are sent to your email immediately after purchase. Check your inbox and spam folder.

q7.question: How can I verify that my eSIM is conectado?
q7.answer: Go to Configurações → Cellular/Mobile Dados. You should see your eSIM profile listed and enabled. Look for signal bars or 'LTE/5G' indicator.

q1.question: Posso usar Hotspot/Tethering?
q1.answer: Sim! Hotspot/tethering is supported on all our plans. You can share your data connection with other devices.

q2.question: Quando meu plano de dados começa?
q2.answer: Your plan starts when you first connect to mobile data at your destino, not when you scan the código QR. You can instalar it in advance.

q3.question: Como funcionam seus planos de dados?
q3.answer: Todos Mobile11 eSIM plans keep you connected. Choose from three plan types: Ilimitado for truly unlimited data at maximum speeds with no throttling, Lite for high speeds upfront then 384 Kbps backup after your quota, or Standard for daily high-speed allowance that resets every 24 hours with backup speeds after.

q4.question: Minha velocidade de internet caiu repentinamente. O que devo fazer?
q4.answer: Você pode ter atingido seu limite diário de alta velocidade. Sua velocidade será restaurada após 24 horas do primeiro uso.

q5.question: Quando meus dados de alta velocidade serão restaurados?
q5.answer: For Standard plans, your high-speed quota resets every 24 hours from your first use. For example, if you activate at 3PM, your high-speed data resets at 3PM the next dia.

q6.question: Posso verificar o uso de dados?
q6.answer: Sim! Check your data usage in your device settings (Configurações → Cellular/Mobile Dados) or log into your mobile11 account dashboard.

q1.question: Quais dispositivos são compatíveis com eSIM?
q1.answer: Mobile11 eSIMs are compatible with a wide range of newer smartphones and tablets including iPhone XS and newer, Samsung Galaxy S20 and newer, Google Pixel 2 and newer, and models from Huawei, Oppo, Motorola, Sony, Xiaomi, Sharp, Honor, Vivo, OnePlus, Nãokia, Asus, Realme, Nãothing, and more. Nãote: Devices manufactured in China/Hong Kong do not have eSIM functionality. Check Configurações → Cellular → Adicionar eSIM to verify your device supports eSIM.

q2.question: Meu telefone está desbloqueado para usar eSIM?
q2.answer: Seu telefone deve estar desbloqueado (não vinculado a operadora) para usar nosso eSIM.

q3.question: O eSIM vem com um número de telefone?
q3.answer: Não, our eSIMs are data-only plans. Keep your primary SIM for calls/SMS, or use apps like WhatsApp, LINE, or Telegram for communication.

q1.question: How do I fix 'Não Internet Connection' after activating the eSIM?
q1.answer: Ensure Dados Roaming is ON (Configurações → Mobile Dados → Dados Roaming). Restart your device and set the eSIM as your primary data line.

q2.question: Meu eSIM mostra 4G/5G mas não tem internet. O que fazer?
q2.answer: Try: 1) Restart phone, 2) Toggle Airplane Mode on/off, 3) Switch from 5G to LTE, 4) Ensure Dados Roaming is ON. Contato support if issue persists.

q3.question: Como alterar a seleção de rede?
q3.answer: Go to Configurações → Mobile Rede → Rede Operators → Selecionar manually. Try different available networks if you experience connectivity issues.

q1.question: Posso reinstalar/reutilizar meu eSIM?
q1.answer: Sim! If you accidentally delete your eSIM, you can reinstall it using the same QR code as long as your plan is still valid.

q2.question: Can I use the eSIM on multiple devices?
q2.answer: Não, each eSIM can only be active on one device at a time. You'll need to purchase a separate eSIM for each device.

q3.question: Can I excluir my eSIM?
q3.answer: Sim, go to Configurações → Cellular → Selecionar your eSIM profile → Excluir eSIM. Salvar your QR code before deleting in case you need to reinstall.

q4.question: What happens if my eSIM expires?
q4.answer: Once expired, your eSIM will no longer provide data service. Compra a new plan before your trip ends, or keep unused data plans for future travels.

q1.question: When will I receive my eSIM?
q1.answer: Instantly! Your QR code and installation details are delivered via email within minutes of purchase. Não waiting required.

q2.question: What is the refund policy?
q2.answer: We offer full refunds for unused eSIMs within 14 dias of purchase. Once activated, refunds are subject to our terms and conditions.

q3.question: How can I contact customer support?
q3.answer: E-mail us at support@mobile11.com, use our live chat, or submit a support ticket. We're available 24/7 to help!

q1.question: How do I join the affiliate program?
q1.answer: Visit our Partner Program page and click 'Join Nãow'. Fill out the registration form with your details, and our team will review your application within 24-48 hours.

q2.question: What commission rates do affiliates earn?
q2.answer: Affiliates earn 10% commission on every sale. Parceiro Managers earn 15% on direct sales plus 5% override commission on their team's sales. There's no cap on earnings!

q3.question: How and when do I get paid?
q3.answer: We offer monthly payouts via bank transfer or PayPal. The minimum payout threshold is $50 USD. Pagamentos are processed on the 15th of each month for the previous month's earnings.

q4.question: How long is the cookie/attribution window?
q4.answer: We use a 30-dia cookie window. If someone clicks your affiliate link and makes a purchase within 30 dias, you'll receive the commission for that sale.

q5.question: Where can I track my affiliate performance?
q5.answer: Entrarto your Affiliate Painel to see real-time statistics including clicks, conversions, commission earnings, and pending payouts.

q6.question: Posso promover o Mobile11 nas redes sociais?
q6.answer: Absolutely! You can share your affiliate link on any platform - websites, blogs, YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter, Facebook, and more. We also provide marketing materials to help you succeed.

q1.question: How do I log in with LINE?
q1.answer: Click 'Sign In' and select the LINE button. You'll be redirected to LINE to authorize access. Once approved, you'll be automaticamente logged in. Your LINE profile picture and name will be linked to your Mobile11 account.

q2.question: How will I receive my eSIM after purchase?
q2.answer: If you logged in with LINE: Your order confirmation with código QR, ICCID, and instalação instructions will be sent directly to your LINE chat. If you logged in with email: Your confirmation will be sent to your registered email address. Both methods include everything you need to instalar your eSIM instantaneamente.

q3.question: I logged in with LINE - can I also get an email copy of my order?
q3.answer: Sim! During checkout, LINE users will see an optional 'Want an email copy too?' field. Simply enter your email address and you'll receive both a LINE chat notification AND an email confirmation with your eSIM details.

q4.question: Can I link my LINE account to an existing Mobile11 account?
q4.answer: Currently, LINE login creates a new account linked to your LINE profile. If you already have a Mobile11 account with an email, you can continue using email login to access your existing orders and profile.

activation.tip1: Turn on Dados Roaming for your eSIM line
activation.tip2: Selecionar the eSIM as your primary data line

issue1.title: Código QR Won't Scan

issue2.title: Não Rede Signal
issue2.solution: Check that Dados Roaming is enabled, eSIM is activated, and your device has been restarted. Wait a few minutes for network registration.

issue3.title: Can't Instalar eSIM

q1.question: How do I check if my device supports eSIM?
q1.answer: Go to Configurações → Cellular/Mobile Dados → look for 'Adicionar eSIM' or 'Adicionar Cellular Plan' option. If you see this option, your device supports eSIM. Alternatively, dial *#06# to see if an EID (eSIM ID) is displayed.

q2.question: Can I use eSIM if my phone is carrier-locked?
q2.answer: Não, your device must be carrier-unlocked to use eSIM from Mobile11. Contato your carrier to check if your device is locked and request an unlock if needed.

q3.question: Why doesn't my China/Hong Kong purchased device support eSIM?
q3.answer: Dispositivos manufactured for or sold in mainland China and Hong Kong typically have eSIM functionality disabled due to local regulations. This applies even to models that support eSIM in other regions.

q4.question: Posso usar eSIM no meu tablet ou smartwatch?
q4.answer: Sim, many iPads, Samsung Galaxy Tabs, and smartwatches support eSIM. Check your device's specifications or settings to confirm eSIM compatibility.

benefitsSection.title: What are the benefits of eSIMs?
benefitsSection.subtitle: Get flexible, affordable and convenient mobile coverage.
benefitsSection.description: You can buy and install an eSIM in minutes — all you need is an internet connection. And because it's digital, there's no plastic involved, which makes it better for the planet. Plus, eSIMs are incredibly flexible. You can store multiple eSIM profiles on one device and switch between them based on your needs.

mobile11Section.title: How does Mobile11 use eSIMs?
mobile11Section.subtitle: Stay conectado in 150+ países with Mobile11.
mobile11Section.description: Mobile11 offers access to mobile networks around the world. Todos our packages include an eSIM, which you can install by scanning a QR code after purchase. Simply connect to any available network and you're online — it's that easy.

needSection.title: What do I need to use an eSIM?
needSection.subtitle: You'll need a device that supports eSIMs.
needSection.description: Many mobile phones and tablets support eSIMs — even some laptops and smartwatches do, too. You'll also need to make sure your device is not carrier-locked. Check out our list of devices that support eSIMs.

hero.title: What is an
hero.subtitle: The future of mobile connectivity. Não physical card needed—just scan, activate, and stay connected anywhere in the world.

explanation.title: SIM Digital, Possibilidades Ilimitadas
explanation.subtitle: It's just like a regular SIM card, only digital.
explanation.description: An eSIM (embedded SIM) is a digital SIM that allows you to ativar a cellular plan without using a physical SIM card. It's built into your device and can be activated instantaneamente by scanning a código QR.

builtIn.title: Tecnologia Integrada
builtIn.description: eSIM is embedded directly into your device's hardware, eliminating the need for a physical card slot.

q1.question: What is an eSIM?
q1.answer: An eSIM (embedded SIM) is a digital SIM that's built into your device. Unlike physical SIM cards that you insert into your phone, an eSIM is activated digitally by scanning a código QR or entering ativação detalhes. It performs the same function as a traditional SIM card but without the physical card.

q2.question: Which mobile devices are compatible with eSIM?
q2.answer: Mobile11 eSIMs are compatible with a wide range of newer smartphones and tablets including iPhone XS and newer, Samsung Galaxy S20 and newer, Google Pixel 2 and newer, and models from Huawei, Oppo, Motorola, Sony, Xiaomi, Sharp, Honor, Vivo, OnePlus, Nãokia, Asus, Realme, Nãothing, and more. Nãote: Devices manufactured in China/Hong Kong do not have eSIM functionality. Check Configurações → Cellular → Adicionar eSIM to verify your device supports eSIM.

q3.question: When does my data plan begin?
q3.answer: Your plan starts when you first connect to mobile data at your destino, not when you scan the código QR. You can instalar it in advance.

q4.question: How do your data plans work?
q4.answer: Todos Mobile11 eSIM plans keep you connected. Choose from three plan types: Ilimitado for truly unlimited data at maximum speeds with no throttling, Lite for high speeds upfront then 384 Kbps backup after your quota, or Standard for daily high-speed allowance that resets every 24 hours with backup speeds after.

q5.question: When will I receive my eSIM?
q5.answer: Instantly! Your QR code and installation details are delivered via email within minutes of purchase. Não waiting required.

q1.question: Can I use eSIM as my main data source in Tailândia?
q1.answer: Absolutely! Many Thai locals use eSIM as their primary data conexão. You can keep your existing SIM for voice calls and use eSIM for data.

q2.question: What's the difference between Day Pass, Max Velocidade, and Limitless?
q2.answer: Day Pass gives you daily high-speed data with 1Mbps backup. Max Velocidade provides high speeds upfront then 384 Kbps to keep you connected. Limitless offers unlimited data at maximum speeds with no throttling, plus it works in 13 Asian countries.

q3.question: Does eSIM work with my Thai phone number?
q3.answer: Sim! eSIM works alongside your existing Thai number. Most modern phones support dual SIM, so you can keep your main number for calls and SMS while using eSIM for data.

q4.question: How fast is the network?
q4.answer: We provide 3G/4G/5G coverage across Tailândia. Limitless plans offer maximum speeds with no throttling. Day Pass and Max Velocidade plans have specific speed tiers but keep you connected at all times.

q5.question: Posso alternar entre planos?
q5.answer: Sim! You can easily add new eSIM plans to your device and switch between them. This flexibility is one of the key advantages of eSIM technology.

q1.question: How much can I earn as an affiliate?
q1.answer: Comissão rates are tiered based on your monthly sales volume. Start at 8% and earn up to 16% as you grow! Starter (0-10 sales): 8%, Bronze (11-30): 10%, Silver (31-60): 12%, Gold (61-100): 14%, Platinum (101+): 16%. Plus loyalty bonuses of up to +3% for long-term partners. Parceiro Managers also earn override commissions (2-5%) on their team's sales. There's no cap on earnings!

q2.question: How do I get paid?
q2.answer: We offer monthly payouts via bank transfer or PayPal. The minimum payout threshold is $50 USD. You can track your earnings in real-time through your dashboard.

q3.question: How long does approval take?
q3.answer: Most applications are reviewed within 24-48 hours. Once approved, you'll receive access to your dashboard and can start sharing your affiliate link immediately.

q4.question: What is the cookie duration?
q4.answer: We use a 30-dia cookie window. This means if someone clicks your link and makes a purchase within 30 dias, you'll receive the commission.

q5.question: Posso promover o Mobile11 nas redes sociais?
q5.answer: Absolutely! You can share your affiliate link on any platform - websites, blogs, YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter, Facebook, and more.

q6.question: Preciso de um website para participar?
q6.answer: Não website required! You can share your link via social media, messaging apps, or any other channel. However, having a website or content platform can help increase your reach.

q7.question: What marketing materials do you provide?
q7.answer: We provide banners, logos, product images, and suggested copy. Parceiro Managers also receive additional promotional content and priority access to new materials.

q8.question: How do I become a Parceiro Manager?
q8.answer: Todos affiliates can recruit sub-affiliates and earn override commissions (2-5% based on your tier) on their team's sales. As you reach higher tiers through monthly sales, your direct and override rates increase. Focus on both direct sales and building your network to maximize earnings.

privacyPolicy.title: Your Privacy Matters

section1.title: 1. Introduction
section1.p1: Welcome to Mobile11. We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. This Política de Privacidade explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our eSIM services, website, and mobile applications (collectively, the "Services").
section1.p2: By using our Services, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Política de Privacidade. If you do not agree with our policies and practices, please do not use our Services.

section2.title: 2. Definitions
section2.accountDesc: A unique account created for you to access our Services.
section2.customerDesc: The individual accessing or using our Services.
section2.deviceDesc: Any device that can access our Services such as a smartphone, tablet, or computer.
section2.esimDesc: An embedded SIM card that allows you to ativar a mobile data plan without using a physical SIM card.
section2.personalDataDesc: Informaçãormation that relates to an identified or identifiable individual.
section2.servicesDesc: Our eSIM services, website, mobile applications, and related services provided by Mobile11.

section3.title: 3. Informaçãormation We Collect
section3.personalInfoDesc: When you register for an account or use our Services, we may collect:
personalInfoItems: Pagamento information (processed securely through third-party payment processors)

section4.title: 4. How We Use Your Informaçãormation
section4.intro: We use the information we collect for the following purposes:
section4.serviceProvisionDesc: To provide, maintain, and improve our eSIM services, process your orders, and ativar your eSIM pacotes.
section4.customerSupportDesc: To respond to your inquiries, provide technical support, and resolve issues.
section4.paymentProcessingDesc: To process transactions and send you related information including purchase confirmations and invoices.
section4.personalizationDesc: To personalize your experience and recommend relevant eSIM pacotes based on your travel destinos.
section4.communicationDesc: To send you service updates, promotional offers, and important notices about our Services.
section4.securityDesc: To detect, prevent, and address technical issues, fraudulent activities, and security threats.
section4.legalComplianceDesc: Para cumprir obrigações legais e responder a solicitações legítimas de autoridades públicas.
section4.analyticsDesc: To analyze usage patterns and improve our Services, website, and user experience.

section5.title: 5. Legal Basis for Processando
section5.intro: We process your personal data based on the following legal grounds:
section5.consentDesc: You have given clear consent for us to process your personal data for specific purposes.
section5.contractPerformanceDesc: Processando is necessary to fulfill our contract with you and provide the Services you requested.
section5.legalObligationsDesc: Processando is necessary to comply with legal obligations such as tax and accounting requirements.
section5.legitimateInterestsDesc: Processando is necessary for our legitimate business interests, such as fraud prevention and improving our Services, provided these interests do not override your rights.

section6.title: 6. Informaçãormation Sharing and Disclosure
section6.intro: We may share your information in the following circumstances:
section6.serviceProvidersDesc: We work with third-party service providers who perform services on our behalf, including:
serviceProvidersItems: eSIM provisioning partners (USIMSA and network carriers)
section6.businessPartnersDesc: We share necessary information with mobile network operators to ativar and provide eSIM services in different países.
section6.legalRequirementsDesc: We may disclose your information if required by law or in response to:
legalRequirementsItems: Legal processes, court orders, or government requests
Protection of rights, property, or safety of Mobile11, our users, or the public
Prevention of fraud or security threats
section6.businessTransfersDesc: In the event of a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred to the acquiring entity.
section6.noSelling: Important: We never sell your personal data to third parties for marketing purposes.

section7.title: 7. Dados Retention
section7.intro: We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Política de Privacidade, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law.
section7.accountDataDesc: Retained for the duration of your account and up to 7 years after account closure for legal and accounting purposes.
section7.transactionRecordsDesc: Mantidos por 7 anos para cumprir regulamentações fiscais e financeiras.
section7.usageDataDesc: Normalmente mantidos por 12 a 24 meses para melhoria do serviço e análise.
section7.supportCommsDesc: Mantidos por 3 anos após a última interação.
section7.deletion: When your data is no longer needed, we will securely excluir or anonymize it.

section8.title: 8. Your Privacy Rights
section8.intro: You have the following rights regarding your personal information:
section8.accessDesc: You can request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
section8.correctionDesc: You can request correction of inaccurate or incomplete personal data.
section8.deletionDesc: You can request deletion of your personal data, subject to legal obligations.
section8.portabilityDesc: You can request your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
section8.restrictDesc: You can request that we limit how we use your personal data.
section8.objectDesc: You can object to processing based on legitimate interests or for direct marketing purposes.
section8.withdrawDesc: You can withdraw consent at any time for processing based on consent.
section8.exercise: To exercise these rights, please contact us at support@mobile11.com. We will respond to your request within 30 dias.

section9.title: 9. Dados Security
section9.intro: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data, including:
items: Encryption of data in transit and at rest
Secure server infrastructure
Regular security assessments
Access controls and authentication
Employee training on data protection
section9.disclaimer: While we strive to protect your personal data, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security.

section10.title: 10. International Dados Transfers
section10.p1: As we operate globally and work with partners in multiple países, your personal data may be transferred to and processed in países other than your país of residence.
section10.p2: When we transfer data internationally, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place:
items: Standard contractual clauses approved by relevant authorities
Adequacy decisions by data protection authorities
Binding corporate rules where applicable
section10.p3: Your data is subject to the laws of those países, which may differ from those in your país of residence.

section11.title: 11. Cookies e Tecnologias de Rastreamento
section11.intro: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to:
items: Remember your preferences and settings
Analyze website traffic and usage patterns
Provide personalized content and recommendations
Improve our Services
section11.manage: You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser configurações. Please note that disabling cookies may affect your experience on our website.

section12.title: 12. Links de Terceiros
section12.content: Our Services may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these websites. We encourage you to read the privacy policies of any third-party websites you visit.

section13.title: 13. Privacidade de Menores
section13.content: Our Services are not intended for children under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 16. If you believe we have collected information from a child under 16, please contact us immediately.

section14.title: 14. Changes to This Política de Privacidade
section14.p1: We may update this Política de Privacidade from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for legal, operational, or regulatory reasons.
section14.p2: We will notify you of any material changes by:
items: Posting the updated Política de Privacidade on our website
Enviaring you an email notification
Displaying a notice in our mobile applications
section14.p3: Your continued use of our Services after any changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Política de Privacidade.

section15.title: 15. Fale Conosco
section15.intro: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Política de Privacidade or our data practices, please contact us:
section15.responseTimeDesc: We aim to respond to all inquiries within 48 hours.

refundPolicy.title: Política de Reembolso
refundPolicy.intro: At Mobile11, we want you to be completely satisfied with your eSIM purchase. This Política de Reembolso explains when and how you may be eligible for a refund.

section1.title: 1. General Reembolso Eligibility
section1.p1: Due to the digital nature of eSIM products, refund eligibility depends on the ativação status of your eSIM:

subsection1.title: eSIMs Não Ativados
items: Full refund available within 30 dias of purchase
eSIM QR code must not have been scanned or installed
Refund processed to original payment method

subsection2.title: eSIMs Ativados
subsection2.content: Geralmente não reembolsável após ativação, com exceções para problemas técnicos (ver Seção 3)

section2.title: 2. Situações Não Reembolsáveis
section2.intro: Refunds are NOT available in the following situations:
items: eSIM has been successfully activated and used
Change of travel plans or no longer needing the service
Purchasing the wrong package (wrong country/data amount)
Device incompatibility that was not verified before purchase
Service worked as described but did not meet personal expectations
Validade period has expired

section3.title: 3. Reembolsos por Problemas Técnicos
section3.intro: We will provide a full refund or replacement if:
items: The eSIM fails to activate due to a technical error on our side
The QR code is defective or cannot be read
The eSIM does not provide the advertised service in the covered country
Rede connectivity is completely unavailable (not just slow speeds)
section3.p2: To qualify for a technical issue refund, you must provide evidence of the issue and contact our support team within 7 dias of attempting activation.

section4.title: 4. Compras Promocionais
section4.content: Purchases made with promotional codes or during special sales events are subject to the same refund policy. The refund amount will be the actual amount paid after any discounts were applied.

section5.title: 5. How to Request a Reembolso
section5.step1: Contato our support team via email at support@mobile11.com
section5.step2: Provide your order number and email address
section5.step3: Explain the reason for your refund request
section5.step4: Inclua capturas de tela ou documentação relevante
section5.p2: Our team will review your request within 2-3 business dias and respond with a decision.

subsection1.title: Processando Time
items: Refund decisions are made within 2-3 business dias
Approved refunds are processed within 5-7 business dias
Bank processing may take an additional 5-10 business dias

subsection2.title: Reembolso Method
subsection2.content: Refunds are issued to the original payment method used for the purchase. We cannot process refunds to different payment methods or accounts.

section7.title: 7. Reembolsos Parciais
section7.intro: Reembolsos parciais podem ser oferecidos em certas circunstâncias:
items: Service was partially used before a technical issue occurred
Package was only partially functional in the covered region
Other situations at our discretion

section8.title: 8. Estornos
section8.p1: We encourage you to contact our support team before initiating a chargeback with your bank or credit card company. We are committed to resolving issues fairly and promptly.
section8.p2: Fraudulent chargebacks may result in account suspension and legal action.

section9.title: 9. Fale Conosco
section9.intro: If you have questions about this Política de Reembolso or need assistance:
section9.responseTimeValue: We aim to respond to all refund inquiries within 24-48 hours.

refundPolicy.footer: This Política de Reembolso is subject to change. Any updates will be posted on this page with the revised date.

q1.question: When does my data plan begin?
q1.answer: The data plan begins as soon as you connect to the local network at your destination. Its validity lasts for the number of dias included in your plan, starting from the moment of activation. You can review the details in the destination description before making a purchase.

q2.question: My código QR isn't working. What should I do?
q2.intro: There are a few reasons why you might be having trouble scanning your código QR. Please go through the checklist below:

step1.title: Is your phone compatible with eSIM?
step1.desc: Make sure your phone supports eSIM. If it does but still won't register, check that your device is unlocked.

step2.title: Are you conectado to Wi-Fi?
step2.desc: eSIM ativação requires an internet conexão. For the best experience, ativar your eSIM at home on Wi-Fi before your trip.

step3.title: Try manual ativação.
step3.desc: If the código QR doesn't work, you can ativar manually. Mobile11 provides a manual ativação code in the email with your código QR.

step4.title: O eSIM já foi ativado?
step4.desc: Each código QR can only be scanned once. If you see a message like 'Cannot add data plan', it may already be activated. Check your phone's SIM card manager or cellular configurações.

step5.title: Ainda não funciona?
step5.desc: If none of the above helps, reach out to our 24/7 customer support via chat. We'll help you get conectado.

q3.question: What is an eSIM?
q3.answer: eSIM is a digital SIM card that enables you to connect to mobile networks without needing a physical card. You can keep multiple eSIMs, allowing access to various carriers, phone numbers, and data plans—perfect for travel or daily use. Just activate it on your device, and you'll be online in minutes.

q4.question: Posso usar Hotspot/Tethering?
q4.answer: There may be some restrictions depending on the local service provider, but in general, Mobile11 eSIMs support data sharing with other devices. You can check the destino's description in advance before purchasing.

q5.question: Is the eSIM activated immediately upon scanning the código QR?
q5.answer: Não! Mobile11 eSIM activates once you connect to the local network at your destination. You can set it up 2–3 hours before your departure, then simply turn on data roaming when you arrive to get connected instantly.

q6.question: When should I set up my eSIM?
q6.answer: We recommend activating your eSIM 2–3 hours before your trip. Please note that you must be connected to Wi-Fi or mobile data during the setup process, as an internet connection is required to install and activate it.

q7.question: Does Mobile11 eSIM come with a phone number for calls or messaging?
q7.answer: Não, Mobile11 eSIM is designed for high-speed internet only. The good news is you can keep your own phone number and all your contacts, so you can stay connected through WhatsApp, iMessage, LINE, WeChat, or your favorite apps while enjoying reliable data abroad.

q8.question: Can I check the data usage?
q8.answer: You can check it through our website by accessing the My Pedidos page and clicking on 'Check Dados Usage'. Alternatively, you can contact our customer support for assistance.

q9.question: When will I receive my eSIM?
q9.answer: Mobile11 will send your eSIM immediately after payment. You'll receive a confirmation email with a código QR and step-by-step ativação instructions. And for your convenience, the detalhes will also be sent via WhatsApp. If you don't receive the email, please contact our customer support team for prompt assistance.

q10.question: How long is the validity period?
q10.answer: The validity period depends on the plan you purchase. It starts from the moment you first connect to the network at your destino, not when you scan the código QR. You can instalar your eSIM in advance and it won't start counting until you use it.

howToConnect.title: Como Conectar
howToConnect.intro: Is your eSIM installed? Great! Follow the steps to get conectado.
howToConnect.step1Title: 1. Certifique-se de que o eSIM está ativado
howToConnect.step1Content: Go to Cellular or Mobile Dados and find your new eSIM under — make sure Turn On This Line is enabled.
howToConnect.step1Tip: Escolher a label for your eSIM that differs from other SIMs on your device.
howToConnect.step2Content: Go to Cellular or Mobile Dados and select Cellular Dados — make sure your eSIM is selected.
howToConnect.step2Tip: Turn off cellular data switching to make sure other SIMs don't use data.
howToConnect.step3Content: Go to Cellular or Mobile Dados and find your new eSIM under "SIMs" — make sure Dados Roaming is enabled.
howToConnect.faqDescription: If you're having trouble, check out our eSIM troubleshooting guide.
howToConnect.faq1Title: Why is my eSIM connecting to the wrong network?
howToConnect.faq1Content: If your eSIM is connecting to the wrong network, you can choose the correct network manually. You can find the available networks in the eSIM detalhes próximo to the ICCID. You'll need to adjust a few configurações in your device to select the correct network.
howToConnect.faq2Title: Why can't I see the eSIM on my device?
howToConnect.faq2Content: If you can't see the eSIM on your device, it may not have a unique label. You'll need to know the ICCID to find the eSIM — you can find this number in the app. Once you have the ICCID, read more to find the eSIM on your device.
howToConnect.faq3Title: How can I avoid roaming charges?
howToConnect.faq3Content: If you have a physical SIM card for your primary plan, the easiest way to avoid roaming charges is to remove the SIM from your device before traveling outside of its coverage area. Otherwise, you can avoid roaming charges by adjusting specific configurações in your device.
howToConnect.faq4Title: Why is my eSIM stuck on "Activating"?
howToConnect.faq4Content: This occurs when you instalar an eSIM outside of its coverage area, before it can connect to a supported network. You don't need to do anything — the "Activating" status will go away when you connect to a network in the coverage area.
howToConnect.faq5Title: How can I use iMessage and FaceTime with my eSIM?
howToConnect.faq5Content: If you're using an Apple device, you can use iMessage and FaceTime with your eSIM — you'll need to adjust a few settings in your device. Nãote, you may need to turn your phone on and off for the settings to take effect.

q1.question: Do unlimited data pacotes have any limits?
q1.answer: Our Limitless plans offer truly unlimited data - you're never cut off. For fair usage, after 10GB of high-speed data per 24-hour period, speeds may be reduced to a guaranteed minimum (typically 5Mbps). This resets daily, ensuring you always have reliable conectividade.

q2.question: What is the fair use policy?
q2.answer: Our fair use policy ensures network quality for all users. You get 10GB of high-speed data daily. After reaching this threshold, speeds are throttled to a minimum guaranteed speed (5Mbps or 1Mbps depending on your plan). Your high-speed allowance resets every 24 hours from your first connection.

q3.question: Can I use hotspot/tethering with unlimited data?
q3.answer: Sim! Hotspot and tethering are fully supported on all our Limitless plans. Compartilhar your connection with laptops, tablets, and other devices without any additional charges.

q4.question: When does my unlimited data plan start?
q4.answer: Your plan starts when you first connect to mobile data at your destino, not when you scan the código QR. You can instalar your eSIM in advance and it will only ativar when you use data for the first time.

q5.question: What speeds can I expect?
q5.answer: During your high-speed period, you'll experience the best available speeds from local carriers (typically 4G/LTE or 5G where available). After the daily fair use threshold, you'll have a guaranteed minimum speed that's sufficient for messaging, emails, maps, and light browsing.

dataDeletion.title: Exclusão de Dados

intro.title: Your Right to Dados Deletion
intro.p1: At mobile11, we respect your privacy and your right to control your personal data. Under GDPR, CCPA, and Tailândia's PDPA, you have the right to request the deletion of your personal information from our systems.
intro.p2: This page explains how you can request deletion of your data, what data we store, and what happens after you enviar a deletion request.

dataTypes.title: What Dados We Loja
dataTypes.intro: We collect and store the following types of personal data:
items: Conta information (name, email address, phone number)
Transaction history (orders, payments, eSIM purchases)
Usage data (app interactions, eSIM usage statistics)
Communication records (support tickets, chat messages, emails)
Social login data (if you signed in via Facebook, Google, or LINE)

howTo.title: How to Request Dados Deletion
howTo.intro: To request deletion of your personal data, please follow these steps:
steps: Enviar an email to our support team with the subject line 'Dados Deletion Request'
Include your registered email address and account details for verification
Specify what data you want deleted (all data or specific categories)
Our team will verify your identity and process your request within 30 dias

whatHappens.title: What Happens After You Request Deletion
whatHappens.intro: Once we receive your deletion request, here's what you can expect:
whatHappens.timelineDesc: We will process your request within 30 dias of receiving it. Complex requests may take up to 45 dias.
whatHappens.confirmationDesc: You will receive an email confirmation once your data has been deleted from our systems.
whatHappens.permanentDesc: Once deleted, your data cannot be recovered. Any active eSIMs associated with your account may stop working.

retention.title: Dados We Must Retain
retention.intro: Due to legal and regulatory requirements, some data cannot be deleted immediately:
items: Transaction records for tax and accounting purposes (retained for 7 years)
Legal dispute resolution data (retained until dispute is resolved)
Fraud prevention records (retained as required by law)
Anonymized analytics data (non-personally identifiable)
retention.note: This retained data is kept secure and is only used for the specific legal purposes mentioned above.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How long does the deletion process take?
faq.a1: We typically complete deletion requests within 30 dias. You'll receive a confirmation email once the process is complete.
faq.q2: Will my active eSIMs still work after deletion?
faq.a2: Não. Deleting your account data will deactivate any eSIMs linked to your account. Please use all remaining data before requesting deletion.
faq.q3: Can I recover my data after deletion?
faq.a3: Não. Dados deletion is permanent and cannot be reversed. We recommend downloading any important information before submitting a deletion request.
faq.q4: What if I only want to excluir my Facebook/social login data?
faq.a4: You can request partial deletion. Specify in your email that you only want social login data removed. Your account will be converted to email-based login.

faqV2.title: Perguntas Frequentes

faqV2.a1: An eSIM (embedded SIM) is a digital SIM that allows you to ativar a mobile plan without using a physical SIM card. It's built into your phone and can be activated instantaneamente by scanning a código QR.
faqV2.q2: Is my phone compatible with eSIM?
faqV2.a2: Most modern smartphones support eSIM, including iPhone XS and newer, Samsung Galaxy S20 and newer, and Google Pixel 3 and newer. Check our compatibility page for the full list.
faqV2.q3: How do I ativar my eSIM?
faqV2.a3: After purchase, you'll receive a QR code via email. Simply scan it with your phone's camera, follow the on-screen instructions, and you're connected! The process takes less than 5 minutes.
faqV2.q4: Can I use my eSIM in multiple países?
faqV2.a4: Sim! We offer regional and global eSIM plans that work across multiple countries. Check the coverage details on each plan to see which countries are included.
faqV2.a5: Our support team is available 24/7 via chat, email, or LINE. We offer support in both English and Thai to assist you with any questions or issues.

loyaltyFaq.title: Perguntas Frequentes sobre Fidelidade
loyaltyFaq.q1: How does the Mobile11 Loyalty Program work?
loyaltyFaq.a1: Every purchase you make earns you loyalty status. As your total spending increases, you move up through Bronze, Silver, Gold, and Platinum tiers — each offering higher cashback rates on future purchases.
loyaltyFaq.q2: How do I earn cashback rewards?
loyaltyFaq.a2: Cashback is automaticamente credited to your Mobile11 Money balance after each qualifying purchase. The cashback percentage depends on your current loyalty tier.
loyaltyFaq.q3: When can I use my cashback?
loyaltyFaq.a3: Your Mobile11 Money balance can be applied to any future eSIM purchase. It's automaticamente available at checkout — no minimum redemption amount required.
loyaltyFaq.a4: Your tier status is based on your total lifetime spending with Mobile11. Once you reach a tier, you keep it as long as you remain an active customer.
loyaltyFaq.q5: Can I combine cashback with promo codes?
loyaltyFaq.a5: Sim! You can use your Mobile11 Money balance together with promotional discounts for even greater savings on your eSIM purchases.
